description_long: This object is a compact submachine gun with a classic design, featuring a dark metallic receiver and barrel, and a wooden or polymer foregrip and stock. The rifle has a prominent folding stock that tucks under the receiver, a straight detachable box magazine, and a cylindrical barrel with a simple front sight post. The grip is angled and ergonomic, made from a dark synthetic or wooden material, and the trigger guard is robust and squared. The receiver is smooth with minimal external attachments, and the magazine well is positioned just ahead of the trigger. The overall finish is matte with some glossy highlights, and the construction appears robust and utilitarian, suitable for urban environments.
description: A compact, dark-finished submachine gun with a folding stock, straight box magazine, and simple iron sights. The design is robust and utilitarian, with a mix of metal and synthetic or wooden components.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, folding stock, straight magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel, front sight post, and narrow profile of the receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the folding stock, magazine, and overall compactness.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the receiver, grip, and the alignment of the stock.
